retry_reason: The refcount decrement always succeeds and has no error return; retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: audit_put_chunk decrements the reference count of an audit_chunk via atomic_long_dec_and_test. If the count reaches zero, it calls free_chunk to release the chunk and its associated resources, effectively freeing the object. The caller must hold a valid reference on the chunk before calling this function; after the call returns, the caller must not dereference or use the chunk pointer again if there are no other outstanding references. This is a standard put wrapper that unconditionally releases one reference.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to decrement the reference count of an audit_chunk and conditionally free it. The only non-refcount logic is the call to free_chunk, which is part of the put contract.
